command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time, json
cmds = [
  ['bun','test','scripts/verify-m063-s01.test.ts'],
  ['bun','run','scripts/verify-m063-s01.ts','--json'],
]
for cmd in cmds:
    start = time.time()
    proc = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
    duration_ms = round((time.time()-start)*1000)
    print(json.dumps({
        'command': ' '.join(cmd),
        'exitCode': proc.returncode,
        'durationMs': duration_ms,
        'stdoutTail': '\n'.join(proc.stdout.strip().splitlines()[-5:]),
        'stderrTail': '\n'.join(proc.stderr.strip().splitlines()[-5:]),
    }))
PY
